layout_strategy.container: max-w-7xl mx-auto px-4 sm:px-6 lg:px-8 py-8

buttons.default: rounded-lg font-medium transition-all duration-200 active:scale-95 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-slate-700 border border-slate-200 hover:bg-slate-50 hover:border-slate-300

cards.style: bg-white rounded-xl border border-slate-200/60 shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

inputs.style: rounded-lg border-slate-200 bg-white/50 focus:bg-white transition-colors focus:ring-2 focus:ring-slate-200 focus:border-slate-400

navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-0 h-full w-64 bg-white border-r border-slate-200 p-6 flex flex-col gap-2 z-50 hidden lg:flex
navigation.mobile_nav: lg:hidden fixed bottom-0 left-0 w-full bg-white border-t border-slate-200 p-4 flex justify-around z-50

visual_enhancers.gradients: None. Use solid colors or extremely subtle mesh gradients for backgrounds only.
visual_enhancers.shadows: shadow-sm for cards, shadow-lg for dropdowns/modals
visual_enhancers.border_radius: rounded-xl (12px) for cards, rounded-lg (8px) for buttons/inputs

assets.image_style: Professional, clean, high-key lighting. Circular avatars.

universal_guidelines: Do NOT use 'Inter' for headings. Use 'Manrope'.
Avoid generic Bootstrap grids. Use the Bento grid strategy.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs (p-6, p-8).
Use specific colors for leave types (Rose=Sick, Amber=Casual, Emerald=Earned).
Ensure high contrast for text (Slate-600+ on white).
All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes.
instructions_to_main_agent: Implement the design using the specified color palette and typography. Override Shadcn defaults in tailwind.config.js or via custom classes. Build the Layout wrapper first. Focus on the 'Bento' grid for the dashboard. Use the specified leave type colors consistently across the app (badges, calendar events, charts).
